[1m[92m     Running[0m `target/debug/gridbox --help`
Local-first Formula 1 telemetry, live timing and race-engineering TUI

Usage: gridbox [OPTIONS] [COMMAND]

Commands:
  live         Start directly in live-session mode using the configured provider
  demo-live    Run a fully local moving live-session simulation with no API key
  doctor       Check OpenF1, Ollama, FastF1 and local storage
  schedule     Print a season schedule from Jolpica
  analyze      Load a FastF1 session summary or compare fastest laps
  config-path  Print the resolved configuration path
  help         Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

Options:
      --config <PATH>  
  -h, --help           Print help
  -V, --version        Print version
